body_txt: A cappella is, like many musical terms, a phrase with multiple definitions.  This distinction is important because A Cappella, the style , transcends genre. It can be applied across multiple places such as religious music, choirs, barbershop, doo-wop, doit, beatboxing, popular music and so on. Musical talent shows frequently have the auditions part sung A cappella. Tons and tons of YouTubers do A cappella covers of various songs (often with the original recording playing in the background) and sometimes create and sing new ones. Opposite Trope of Instrumentals .
